summary: Cocktails && Code is a modern R&B track that merges summer nightlife vibes with the aspirational tone of personal growth through technology and self-improvement. The song encourages listeners to embrace their ambitions and find empowerment in both leisure and productivity.

sections.name: Bridge - Female Lead with Group Harmonies
Final Chorus - Female Group Vocals + Male Ad-libs

A person standing atop a mountain peak under a clear blue sky, holding a trophy made of code
